message.content:
Search all .scss files (except _tokens.scss) in /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/ for color-related Sass variable usages. I need to understand:
1. Every unique Sass color variable name used (e.g. $color-background, $text-400, $border-100)
2. Any rgba() or other CSS color functions that use Sass color variables as arguments (e.g. `rgba($color-accent, 0.3)`)
3. Any color-related variables that are NOT from _tokens.scss (locally defined in component files)

Output a complete list of unique patterns found, grouped by type (direct variable usage vs. derived/computed usage). This will inform a migration from Sass variables to CSS custom properties.

Perfect! Now I have all the information needed. Let me compile the comprehensive analysis.

## Complete Analysis: Sass Color Variable Usages

Based on a thorough search of all `.scss` files in `/Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol/src/`, here is the complete inventory of color-related Sass variable patterns:

### 1. Direct Color Variable Usage (from _tokens.scss)

#### Primary Color Variables:
- `$color-background` - Dark background (#191919)
- `$color-surface` - Card/panel surface (#232325)
- `$color-surface-hover` - Hover state for surfaces (#2a2a2d)
- `$color-surface-footer` - Footer background with transparency
- `$color-text-primary` - Main text color (#e5e5ea)
- `$color-accent` - Primary interactive color (#007aff)
- `$color-accent-hover` - Accent hover state (#0a84ff)
- `$color-destructive` - Error/delete color (#ff453a)
- `$color-success` - Success indicator (#30d158)
- `$color-text-on-accent` - Text on accent backgrounds (#ffffff)
- `$color-text-on-accent-secondary` - Secondary text on accent (rgba)
- `$color-kbd-background-on-accent` - Keyboard key on accent
- `$color-code-background` - Code block backgrounds
- `$color-tag-background` - Tag backgrounds
- `$color-selection-background` - Text selection background
- `$color-toggle-knob` - Toggle switch knob color

#### Opacity/Derived Color Variables:
- `$text-100` - 10% opacity text color
- `$text-400` - 40% opacity text color
- `$text-600` - 60% opacity text color
- `$border-100` - 10% opacity border color
- `$border-200` - 20% opacity border color

### 2. rgba() Usage with Sass Color Variables

#### In _tokens.scss (VARIABLE DEFINITIONS):
```scss
$color-selection-background: rgba($color-accent, 0.1);
$color-text-on-accent-secondary: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7);
$color-kbd-background-on-accent: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.15);
$color-code-background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06);
$color-tag-background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1);
$color-surface-footer: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05);
$text-100: rgba($color-text-primary, 0.1);
$text-400: rgba($color-text-primary, 0.4);
$text-600: rgba($color-text-primary, 0.6);
$border-100: rgba($color-text-primary, 0.1);
$border-200: rgba($color-text-primary, 0.2);
```

#### In Component .scss Files (ACTUAL USAGE):
- `/src/styles/global.scss:26` - `rgba($color-accent, 0.3)` in `::selection`
- `/src/components/command_palette/command_palette.scss:21-22` - `rgba($color-background, 0.4)` and `rgba($color-surface, 0.4)` in gradient
- `/src/components/form/form_file_picker.scss:33` - `rgba($color-accent, 0.15)` for pill background
- `/src/components/form/form_tag_picker.scss:43` - `rgba($color-accent, 0.15)` for tag background

### 3. Locally-Defined Variables in Component Files (Non-Color)

These are layout/sizing variables, NOT color-related:
- `$emoji-grid-columns: 6` (emoji_picker_view.scss)
- `$file-picker-pill-height: 26px` (form_file_picker.scss)
- `$file-picker-pill-max-width: 240px` (form_file_picker.scss)
- `$file-picker-remove-size: 14px` (form_file_picker.scss)
- `$checkbox-size: 16px` (form.scss)
- `$tooltip-max-width: 240px` (tooltip.scss)
- `$quick-look-width: 620px` (quick_look.scss)
- `$quick-look-max-height: 460px` (quick_look.scss)
- `$quick-look-header-height: 44px` (quick_look.scss)
- `$tag-picker-input-min-height: 34px` (form_tag_picker.scss)
- `$tag-picker-tag-height: 22px` (form_tag_picker.scss)
- `$tag-picker-tag-max-width: 120px` (form_tag_picker.scss)
- `$tag-picker-remove-size: 14px` (form_tag_picker.scss)
- `$tag-picker-input-height: $space-6` (form_tag_picker.scss)
- `$tag-picker-input-min-width: 60px` (form_tag_picker.scss)
- `$tag-picker-menu-max-height: 180px` (form_tag_picker.scss)

### 4. Files with Color Variable Usage Summary

**Files using color variables (30 total):**
1. `/src/styles/global.scss` - 4 unique color variables
2. `/src/components/toast/toast.scss` - 5 color variables
3. `/src/components/grid/grid_item/grid_item.scss` - 3 color variables
4. `/src/components/search_bar/search_bar.scss` - 6 color variables
5. `/src/components/empty_state/empty_state.scss` - 3 color variables
6. `/src/components/kbd/kbd.scss` - 2 color variables
7. `/src/components/action_panel/action_panel.scss` - 7 color variables
8. `/src/components/list/list_item/list_item.scss` - 5 color variables
9. `/src/components/command_palette/command_palette.scss` - 3 + rgba usage
10. `/src/components/detail/detail.scss` - 9 color variables
11. `/src/components/action_panel/actions_dropdown.scss` - 10 color variables
12. `/src/components/search_bar/search_dropdown.scss` - 7 color variables
13. `/src/components/hud/hud.scss` - 3 color variables
14. `/src/components/form/form_tag_picker.scss` - 7 + rgba usage
15. `/src/components/form/form_file_picker.scss` - 5 + rgba usage
16. `/src/components/form/form.scss` - 9 color variables
17. `/src/components/tooltip/tooltip.scss` - 5 color variables
18. `/src/components/clipboard_history/clipboard_history_view.scss` - 2 color variables
19. `/src/components/quick_look/quick_look.scss` - 9 color variables
20. `/src/components/alert/alert.scss` - 8 + lighten() function
21. `/src/components/emoji_picker/emoji_picker_view.scss` - 3 color variables
22. `/src/components/list/list_section/list_section.scss` - 1 color variable
23. `/src/components/settings/settings_view.scss` - 9 color variables

### Key Insights for CSS Custom Properties Migration

**1. Total Unique Color Variables: 16**
- 10 primary colors
- 6 opacity-derived variants

**2. Critical rgba() Pattern (4 instances):**
- `rgba($color-accent, 0.1)` and `rgba($color-accent, 0.15)` (2x for tags/pills)
- `rgba($color-background, 0.4)` and `rgba($color-surface, 0.4)` (in gradients)

**3. Sass Functions Used:**
- `rgba()` - opacity blending (11 total instances)
- `lighten()` - called once in alert.scss for hover state

**4. No Locally-Defined Color Variables**
All color variables come from `_tokens.scss`. Component files contain only layout/sizing variables.

**5. Integration Complexity:**
- 30 component files depend on token colors
- 4 instances of dynamic rgba() that may require fallback handling in CSS custom properties
- 1 instance of `lighten()` function that requires migration strategy

This inventory enables a clean migration path to CSS custom properties with proper handling of opacity calculations and functional color manipulations.
